_doc: Independent adversarial QA review of Fleet B Lane 3 (zero-corp ZIP sweep, wave 2). READ-ONLY. No DB/LEDGER/PROGRESS writes; no mutation of prior QA files (this is a NEW file). New-session QA role = review-only validation gate.
UPSTREAM_FREEZE: Consolidation REMAINS FROZEN. These verdicts pre-stage eligibility only; nothing may be written to ownership_tier/LEDGER/PROGRESS until the Gate Owner finishes the canonical manifest + validate-only pass and the user explicitly approves consolidation.
verdict: PASS — clean gate. 0 structural/definitional corrections required to the 11 classified rows. 2 advisory findings for the Gate Owner (1 denominator-integrity MUST-FIX, 1 tier-precision non-blocking). The conservative gate held all 13 QA-flagged rows at needs_verification.

scope_reconciliation.file_actually_contains: 184 classifications[] (= 11 status='classified' + 173 status='needs_verification'), 10 rejected[], 0 held[], 0 conflicts[]
scope_reconciliation.resolution: No discrepancy. '11 classified rows' = the 11 rows with status='classified' (_meta.by_status_classifications.classified=11). '13 QA flags' = the 13-entry _meta._qa_flags array. The 184 is the full promotable+held classification array; only the 11 are promoted-classified, the other 173 are honestly held at needs_verification.

validation_txt_status.earlier_state: At ~10:52 the validation .txt was a Python traceback — consolidate_census.py was mis-invoked with '--validate-only' passed as the positional results_path argument, producing FileNotFoundError at load_rows(). Lane 3 was NOT validated at that point.
validation_txt_status.current_state: RE-RUN AND FIXED. The .txt now reads: 'Loaded 184 classification rows ... Validation OK ... validate-only complete; no DB/ledger/progress writes.' Lane 3 has now passed the schema/DB validate-only gate.
validation_txt_status.caveat: validate-only is a SCHEMA/DB gate, not an evidence re-judge. Evidence sufficiency is this QA file's job, not the validator's.

DA_synthetics.note: All 10 rejected[] are DA_-prefixed synthetic NPIs with no federal NPI; zero leaked into classifications[].

specialist_ortho_leakage.note: The 2 specialist-network QA flags (ALEXANDER KATSNELSON DMD PC 838ebcf62653e56e; NEIL M. WARSHAWSKY DDS MS PC f41b71ce9309dca1 — Warshawsky is a known Chicago orthodontist) are flagged on AO/brand-network specialty, both HELD at needs_verification, neither promoted. Correctly out of the GP denominator.

true_independent_not_defaulted.note: Critical: 96 proposed true_independent are HELD at needs_verification (NOT promoted). The gate does NOT silent-default to true_independent — honoring the standing 'true independent is earned with evidence' rule. Only the 9 with verified-quality intel dossiers + official-website + ADA/Healthgrades/ZocDoc corroboration were promoted.

true_independent_9.why: See finding_2. Verified dossier confirms dentist-owned single-location independent (acq_found=0), so headline-neutral; BUT its own reasoning + live entity_classification say family_practice (3 Feng providers, shared EIN 363094406), which does not fit T1's strict 'one dentist owns ONE location.'

single_loc_group_2.name: Shah Dental (Modern Smiles)
single_loc_group_2.why: Dr. Rita Shah co-founder of Modern Smiles, 2 unrelated dentists one location, dentist-owned, no DSO/MSO — correct T2 concept.

single_loc_group_2.name: Iqbal Dental (Modern Smiles)
single_loc_group_2.why: Dr. Siddra Iqbal, the OTHER co-founder of the SAME Modern Smiles practice — same phone, same building. Correct T2 concept but a DUPLICATE LOCATION of the Shah row (see finding_1).

findings.title: Modern Smiles is one physical practice represented as TWO location rows, both classified single_loc_group

db_facts.dedup_miss_cause: normalized_address STRINGS differ (one has city/state/zip appended, the other does not), so the address-dedup did not collapse them — but identical phone + identical street + the dossier ('co-founded by Dr. Rita Shah and Dr. Siddra Iqbal') prove ONE physical door.

findings.impact: If BOTH rows are consolidated as single_loc_group, Modern Smiles is counted as 2 GP locations and adds +1 to the Consolidated (T2) headline for a single physical practice. Correct disposition: ONE single_loc_group door (collapse the pair; the two NPIs are co-owners of one group, not two practices).
findings.classification_is_correct: The TIER (single_loc_group) is right — 2 unrelated co-founders, one location, dentist-owned, no DSO/MSO. Only the row count is wrong.
findings.recommendation: Gate Owner: collapse 997fb9c989f09b76 + 772fe78f8b2369eb to a single physical door before counting. Do NOT drop the classification; merge the rows. Consider a normalized_address normalization pass (strip trailing city/state/zip) to catch sibling dedup misses in other ZIPs.

findings.title: First Dental classified true_independent but is a 3-provider family practice
findings.tier_model_gap: The 6-tier ownership_tier model has no dedicated family-practice tier. T1 true_independent = 'one dentist owns ONE location'; T2 single_loc_group = '2+ UNRELATED dentists' (family is explicitly excluded). A single-location family group fits neither cleanly.
findings.impact: Headline-NEUTRAL: family_practice is independent (not Consolidated and not DSO/PE) under any reasonable mapping, so the Consolidated and DSO/PE-only headlines are unaffected. Only the granular tier label is imprecise.
findings.recommendation: Gate Owner: set one policy for how family practices map onto the 6 tiers (e.g., a family flag under the independent umbrella, or fold into T1 with a related-providers note). Until then, First Dental's independent status is correct; only its true_independent SUB-label is debatable.

gate_conservatism_endorsed: The gate's discipline is correct and worth preserving: only 9 of 105 proposed true_independent (9 classified + 96 held) were promoted, all on verified-quality intel dossiers with exact_address_match; all 13 _qa_flags (9 closed + 2 specialist + 1 reconcile-with-main + 1 institutional-vs-stealth + 1 db-anomaly + 1 invalidated-signal) were held at needs_verification or excluded, none reaching the classified set; all DA synthetics rejected. This is the opposite of the wave-1 over-promotion that required 59 corrections.

cross_file_notes.RENOVATIO_DENTAL_INC: QA flag reconcile_with_main (d96e2b15e57ec2c6): AO Nguyen links to 'Precision Dental Care' chain. Main's reach5 wave adjudicated Precision Dental Care as dentist-owned multi, no PE -> dentist_multi, NOT stealth_dso. Held at needs_verification — correct. BUT note: my reach5 v2 sign-off (PART_2) recorded that 2 Precision Dental Care LLC rows are dso_regional + carry affiliated_dso in the LIVE DB — an OBJECTIVE T3/T5 boundary conflict still open for the Gate Owner. Renovatio inherits that unresolved boundary; keep held until the Gate Owner sets one Precision Dental Care policy.
cross_file_notes.PRIMEHEALTH_OF_ILLINOIS: QA flag institutional_vs_stealth (4ec51b1b, not in classifications[]): 5-state multi-specialty org (dental+podiatry+optometry+audiology), PrimeHealth Group LLC parent. Concur it may be T6 institutional rather than stealth_dso — Gate Owner judgment. Correctly not promoted.
cross_file_notes.John_Katsis_DDS: QA flag db_data_anomaly (d027da6419b302cd): NPPES NPI 1962707620 maps to RALPH DERANGO not Katsis — a DB label error for the reset/Gate Owner, not an ownership finding. Concur; out of QA scope.
cross_file_notes.Albert_Mategrano_Bartlett: QA flag invalidated_signal (lid null): the '9 locations' intel came from bartlettdentalcareil.com registered to a DIFFERENT NPI (Sandra Song) — cross-contamination, multi-location signal INVALIDATED. Concur, do not promote.

recommendation: Accept the Lane 3 gate as PASS. Promote nothing yet (freeze stands). Before consolidation, the Gate Owner must (1) collapse the Modern Smiles duplicate pair to one single_loc_group door [finding_1], and (2) set a family-practice tier-mapping policy covering First Dental [finding_2]. Keep all 173 needs_verification + 10 rejected parked. The DO_NOT_MUTATE_WAVE1 boundary is respected — this is a separate Lane-3 queue and the wave-1 QA files are untouched.
